subject: An atom-like orbital diagram with colored energy orbs representing different Pokémon energy types, arranged in circular orbits against a vivid cosmic background
description: The art depicts a stylized atomic or orbital model composed of multiple colored spheres — each representing a different basic Pokémon energy type — arranged in elliptical orbital paths around a central convergence point. The spheres appear in distinct hues: green, red, blue, yellow, and purple, referencing the standard energy color palette of the TCG. The background is a deep pink-to-magenta gradient with lighter radial streaks suggesting energy radiation or cosmic space. The overall composition is geometric, graphic, and abstract — more illustration than scene, with no characters, creatures, or setting.
foreground: orbital diagram with colored energy orbs in circular paths
background: deep pink-magenta radial gradient with light streaks
